title: The Seraphim Hunt Everyone
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, York, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Nami as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was Nami!! All four of those things must be running wild!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How're we meant to protect everyone on top of the seven vegapunks?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, Helmet! GIMME THE Cuff Keys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: _I'll leave the decision in your hands,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just please protect the Stella at all costs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When those four guys are outta the way...

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: ...and you realize you can't beat me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You won't be a sore-loser and go after my friends and the vegapunks, RIGHT?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You idiot! These guys won't fall for a taunt like tha--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the top priority on my hit list, you straw Hatted bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't go out of order, but your friends won't outlive you for long!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
